data.description:
## Why
The plan-review calibration epic (6982) can cheaply measure DETECTION on KNOWN-seeded defects (E2) and
judge RELIABILITY via self-consistency (E6), and it can lean on the gate's own persisted sidecar
validity/impact. What it CANNOT currently produce is an **independent finding-level TP/FP gold set** — a
verdict on the gate's surface/drop decisions from a standard OTHER than the gate itself. That gold set is
the missing ingredient for measuring the gate's PRECISION on REAL plans (false-positive rate) and for
calibrating Pass-2's sub-question / impact-axis thresholds against ground truth rather than the gate's own
opinion. This idea parks that work, DESIGNED ENOUGH to resume, once human adjudication time is budgeted.

## Context — why the first attempt (E1's adjudication corpus) was invalidated
The E1 finding-adjudication corpus was labeled by a process WEAKER than the gate it judged and is invalid
(79% of labels contaminated). Two root causes, both to AVOID here:
1. The LLM rater saw a TRUNCATED plan (PLAN_CAP=6000 chars); production reviews the WHOLE plan + children.
2. The LLM rater ran single-pass with NO tools; production runs 16 criteria as AGENTIC finders that grep
   the codebase. The human adjudication inherited the flaw (dispute set selected by the faulty process,
   anchored on faulty rationales, not independently code-grounded). Re-running the gate's OWN grounded
   verifier to label is CIRCULAR (it just reproduces the sidecar). So the gold set MUST come from
   independent HUMAN judgment, made efficient by grounded evidence.

## What (design — hard-won constraints)
Build a stratified, review-time-faithful, human-adjudicated finding-level TP/FP gold set:
- **Sample:** reuse the surviving E1 finding SAMPLE (300 surfaced + 100 dropped, text-bearing, positionally
  bucketed by coverage.counts, stratified by criterion). Over-weight the code-grounded criteria
  (E4/G1G2/G3/G4/G6/G7/T1/T3/T5c/T8/T10/T11/T13/T14/A1/removal-rationale) and the surfaced/dropped boundary,
  where the gate is hardest to judge.
- **Adjudicator capability floor (non-negotiable):** the human must judge each finding with (a) the WHOLE
  plan + children (never truncated), and (b) the finding's cited code. Provide GROUNDED EVIDENCE via the
  already-prototyped reuse pipeline (harnesses/grounded_batch_adjudicate.py + verify_single_finding.yaml):
  it reruns production's plan-review-verifier-agentic (assemble_context + get_runner agentic + pai_tools
  codebase tools) to surface the cited code, the binary sub-answers, and the impact axes — so the human
  adjudicates efficiently, NOT from raw text. The human JUDGMENT stays independent of the gate (do not adopt
  the verifier's label as truth — use its evidence).
- **Review-time grounding (required):** ground each finding at the commit its review ran against. Recover it
  from the ticket's REVIEW_RESULT event timestamps -> the contemporaneous origin/main SHA (git rev-list -1
  --before). Current-HEAD grounding is biased (drift flips verdicts: e165 moved dropped->advisory).
- **Plan-version fidelity (required):** restrict to plan_matches_review=True tickets (~85%/165 of 195 in the
  E1 sample; compare the review round's material_fingerprint to the current one). Exclude drifted-plan
  tickets (the finding is about a plan that no longer exists) unless old-plan reconstruction is added.
- **Reliability:** double-adjudicate a stratified subset by a second human; report a prevalence-robust
  agreement (Gwet AC1 / raw agreement), NOT bare Cohen's kappa (TP-skew triggers the kappa paradox).
- **Deliverable:** a frozen gold JSONL {finding_id, ticket_id, review_sha, plan_matches_review, human_label
  (TP/FP), adjudicator, grounded_evidence_ref}, plus the gate's own sidecar call per finding, so the
  human-vs-gate DELTA localizes which Pass-2 sub-questions/axes miscalibrate.

## How it enriches epic 6982
- Gives E2/E3/R1 a real FP/TP standard to calibrate blocking thresholds + measure precision on REAL plans
  (complements E2's construct-valid seeded-defect detection ground truth).
- Turns E6 from self-consistency-only into self-consistency-vs-truth (does a stable judge also agree with the
  human gold?).
- The human-vs-verifier deltas are the direct refinement backlog for the Pass-2 verification questions.

## Cost / prerequisite
The BINDING constraint is human adjudication TIME (this is why it is deferred, not the LLM cost — the grounded
evidence pipeline is ~$0.30/finding). Budget/staff the human adjudication before promoting idea->open. The
machinery (sample, grounded evidence harness, review-time resolver) already exists from the E1 session.

## Acceptance Criteria (for when promoted idea -> open)
- [ ] A stratified human-adjudicated gold set of >= N findings (choose N by human budget) is committed, each
      row grounded at its review-time SHA with plan_matches_review=True and grounded evidence attached.
- [ ] A double-adjudicated subset reports prevalence-robust inter-adjudicator agreement (Gwet AC1 + raw).
- [ ] The gate's sidecar call is recorded beside each human label; the human-vs-gate delta table is produced
      and handed to the Pass-2-refinement stories.
- [ ] The adjudication protocol (whole-plan + code-grounded + review-time + independent human judgment) is
      documented so the gold set is reproducible and defensibly independent of the gate.
data.title: Human-adjudicated finding-level TP/FP gold corpus (independent, grounded, review-time-faithful) — future enrichment for the plan-review calibration epic
